sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56568" key="kene/wsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κενέωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κένωσις</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
